7+ Years of

Our Story

A Studio Built
on Precision

Artistry The Unisex Salon was founded on a simple belief: that every client — regardless of gender, age or occasion — deserves the same level of technical mastery and artistic attention usually reserved for editorial shoots.

Tucked into Indira Gandhi Nagar, our studio blends a calm, design-forward space with stylists trained in the latest global techniques — from precision cutting and balayage to skin therapy and nail artistry. We don't just style hair. We study your face, your lifestyle, and your goals, then build a look that holds up long after you've left the chair.

12k+ Happy Clients
15 Expert Stylists
4.9★ Google Rating
Explore Services
What We Offer

Services, Crafted

Every service is performed by trained specialists using premium, salon-grade products — tailored to you, never templated.

Hair Styling & Cuts

Precision cutting, balayage, global color, keratin smoothening and bridal hairstyling — shaped around your face and lifestyle.

From ₹499

Skin & Facials

De-tan, hydrafacial, anti-acne and brightening treatments using dermat-approved products for visible, lasting results.

From ₹799

Nail Studio

Gel extensions, nail art, manicure & pedicure spa rituals finished with precision detailing and long-wear polish.

From ₹399

Bridal & Party

Full bridal packages — HD makeup, draping, hairstyling and trial sessions for your most important day.

From ₹4,999

Men's Grooming

Precision haircuts, beard sculpting, hot towel shaves and skin treatments built for the modern man.

From ₹299

Spa & Wellness

Body massage, waxing and detox rituals designed to unwind, restore and refresh — mind and body.

From ₹699
